page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bfimpute is a powerful imputation tool for scRNA-seq data that recovers the dropout event by factorizing the count matrix into the product of gene-specific and cell-specific feature matrices.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bfimpute is a powerful imputation tool for scRNA-seq data that recovers the dropout event by factorizing the count matrix into the product of gene-specific and cell-specific feature matrices.
